homepage.heroSubline: Fast, reliable fixes for your home's essential appliances. Serving Central Florida with same-day service for urgent repairs.
aboutText: Since 2012, Apex Appliance Repair has been keeping Orlando homes running smoothly with prompt, professional appliance repairs. We understand how Florida's heat and humidity can strain appliances, and we're here to help.
Our certified technicians use manufacturer-approved parts and diagnostic tools to ensure long-lasting repairs. We focus on fixing it right the first time, saving you money and hassle.
From historic Winter Park homes to Lake Nona's modern developments, we're proud to serve our Central Florida neighbors. When your fridge or AC acts up, we've got your back.

valueProps.title: Florida-Tested Expertise
valueProps.description: Our repairs withstand Orlando's extreme heat, humidity, and storm conditions.

valueProps.title: Same-Day Availability
valueProps.description: Urgent repairs available 7 days a week because appliance emergencies don't wait.

valueProps.title: Honest Assessments
valueProps.description: We'll tell you straight whether repair or replacement makes more sense.

valueProps.title: Local Parts Inventory
valueProps.description: Most common Florida appliance parts stocked in our Orlando warehouse.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-APP-R92 for fast Orlando service. We're standing by to get your kitchen or laundry back online.

services.name: Refrigerator Repair
services.shortDescription: Emergency cooling repairs to protect your groceries in Orlando's heat.
services.description:
When your fridge fails in Orlando's climate, food spoilage happens fast. Our technicians specialize in diagnosing compressor issues, seal failures, and cooling system problems common in Florida homes.

We carry replacement parts for all major brands including Sub-Zero, LG, and Whirlpool. Whether it's a freezer not cooling in your Baldwin Park condo or ice maker issues in your Lake Nona home, we'll restore cold storage fast.

Florida's humidity causes extra strain on refrigerator components. Our preventative maintenance checks can extend your appliance's lifespan by catching small issues before they become costly repairs.
process: Step 1: Diagnostic testing of cooling system and electrical components
Step 2: Explanation of repair options with transparent pricing
Step 3: Same-day parts replacement using Florida-rated components
Step 4: Performance testing and energy efficiency check
benefits: Prevent food loss during Orlando's hot seasons
Manufacturer-trained technicians on all major brands
Warranty-backed repairs for peace of mind
Energy efficiency optimization for Florida homes

faq.question: How urgent is refrigerator repair in Florida's heat?
faq.answer: Extremely urgent - food begins spoiling within hours when temperatures exceed 90°F. We prioritize fridge calls with same-day service.

faq.question: Why do my fridge seals fail so often?
faq.answer: Florida's humidity causes rubber gaskets to degrade faster. We install UV-resistant seals that last 2-3x longer in our climate.

faq.question: Can you repair vintage appliances in historic homes?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in maintaining older appliances common in Winter Park and Thornton Park historic districts, often fabricating custom parts when needed.

services.name: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert laundry system repairs for Orlando's busy households.
services.description:
From College Park bungalows to gated community estates, we fix all washer and dryer models. Florida's hard water causes unique challenges for laundry appliances, leading to frequent pump failures and mineral buildup.

Our technicians are certified in repairing high-efficiency models common in newer Orlando developments. We also service vintage laundry pairs found in mid-century Mills 50 homes. Common fixes include drum bearing replacements, electronic control board repairs, and venting system overhauls.

We pay special attention to dryer vent safety - a critical concern in Florida's fire-prone climate. Our vent cleaning and inspection service helps prevent lint fires while improving drying efficiency.
process: Step 1: Complete diagnostic of mechanical and electrical systems
Step 2: Hard water damage assessment and treatment options
Step 3: Precision repair using corrosion-resistant parts
Step 4: Safety inspection and performance verification
benefits: 24/7 emergency service for flooded laundry rooms
Hard water solutions specific to Central Florida
Vent fire prevention services
Stackable unit expertise for condos and apartments

faq.question: Why does my washer leak during summer storms?
faq.answer: Humidity causes hoses to expand/contract. We install climate-adaptive hoses that withstand Orlando's weather fluctuations.

faq.question: How often should dryer vents be cleaned here?
faq.answer: Every 6 months minimum - our sandy soil and humidity create perfect conditions for dangerous lint buildup.

faq.question: Can you fix coin-op machines in rental properties?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We service commercial laundry equipment for Kissimmee vacation rentals and Orlando apartment complexes.

services.name: Oven & Range Repair
services.shortDescription: Precise cooking appliance repairs for Orlando homes.
services.description:
From gas line leaks to electronic control failures, we keep Orlando kitchens cooking safely. Florida's climate causes particular issues with oven igniters, humidity-sensitive electronics, and coastal corrosion.

We service all fuel types including natural gas lines common in newer developments and electric ranges found in mid-century homes. Our technicians are certified in repairing induction cooktops popular in Lake Mary's upscale kitchens and commercial-grade ranges in Thornton Park's chef residences.

Safety is our priority with gas appliance repairs. We conduct thorough leak tests and carbon monoxide checks after every service call. For older homes, we can retrofit outdated electrical connections to meet current Florida building codes.
process: Step 1: Safety inspection and gas/electrical system check
Step 2: Component-level diagnosis using manufacturer schematics
Step 3: Precision repair with climate-appropriate parts
Step 4: Calibration and safety verification
benefits: Fast response for holiday cooking emergencies
Gas line certification for safety compliance
Vintage appliance preservation services
Energy efficiency upgrades available

faq.question: Why does my oven take longer to preheat in summer?
faq.answer: High ambient temperatures force components to work harder. We can install upgraded heating elements designed for Florida conditions.

faq.question: Can you convert my gas range to electric?
faq.answer: Yes, we're licensed for fuel conversion projects common during Orlando kitchen remodels.

faq.question: How dangerous are faulty oven igniters?
faq.answer: Very - unburned gas can accumulate. We replace worn igniters immediately and conduct complete gas safety checks.

services.name: Dishwasher Repair
services.shortDescription: Quiet, efficient dishwasher repairs for Orlando homes.
services.description:
Florida's hard water wreaks havoc on dishwashers, causing scale buildup and premature pump failure. We specialize in restoring clean cycles to Orlando homes, from Baldwin Park's new constructions to historic properties with original cabinetry.

Our technicians are experts at diagnosing drainage issues common in Florida's low-lying areas. We carry specialized parts to repair leaky door seals damaged by humidity and replace worn spray arms affected by mineral deposits.

For homes with older plumbing, we offer flow rate testing and can install water softener bypass systems to protect your dishwasher. We also service luxury brands like Miele and Bosch found in Lake Mary's high-end kitchens.
process: Step 1: Complete water flow and drainage assessment
Step 2: Hard water damage evaluation and treatment plan
Step 3: Seal and gasket replacement with humidity-resistant materials
Step 4: Noise reduction tuning and cycle testing
benefits: Hard water solutions using Florida-specific treatments
Quiet operation tuning for open-concept homes
Same-day parts availability for most models
Drainage solutions for older Orlando plumbing

faq.question: Why does my dishwasher leave spots despite rinse aid?
faq.answer: Central Florida's water hardness exceeds most products' capacity. We install supplemental filtration systems that solve this.

faq.question: Can you repair panel-ready dishwashers?
faq.answer: Yes, we're experienced with built-in models common in Winter Park's luxury kitchen remodels.

faq.question: How often should dishwashers be serviced here?
faq.answer: Annual maintenance prevents hard water damage - we recommend our preventative care package.

services.name: AC Unit Repair
services.shortDescription: Cooling appliance repairs for Orlando's brutal summers.
services.description:
When your window unit or portable AC fails during Orlando's sweltering summers, we provide emergency repairs to restore comfort. These essential appliances work overtime in our climate, leading to frequent compressor failures and drainage issues.

We specialize in servicing all types of residential cooling appliances, from vintage window units in College Park cottages to modern ductless systems in Lake Nona smart homes. Our technicians are trained to diagnose electrical faults caused by Florida's power surges and humidity-related condensation problems.

Preventative maintenance is key for AC appliances. Our seasonal tune-ups include coil cleaning to maintain efficiency, drainage line treatments to prevent algae growth, and electrical connection checks for storm readiness.
process: Step 1: Complete cooling system diagnostic
Step 2: Condensate drainage inspection and cleaning
Step 3: Electrical safety testing and component repair
Step 4: Performance optimization and efficiency testing
benefits: 24/7 emergency service during heat waves
Surge protection installation available
Humidity control solutions
Energy efficiency improvements

faq.question: Why does my window AC freeze up in summer?
faq.answer: Florida's high humidity causes rapid frost buildup. We install climate-adaptive expansion valves to prevent this.

faq.question: Can you repair older units without replacement parts?
faq.answer: We maintain an extensive inventory of legacy parts for Orlando's many historic homes.

faq.question: How can I prepare my AC for hurricane season?
faq.answer: Our storm prep service includes securing units, protecting electrical connections, and cleaning drains to prevent water damage.

reviews.name: Marisol T.
reviews.text: Saved $1,200 on a new fridge when our Sub-Zero died before Thanksgiving. The tech diagnosed a failed compressor relay and had it cooling again in 90 minutes. Even showed me how to clean the condenser coils properly for Florida's dusty summers.

reviews.name: James K.
reviews.text: Our rental property's washer flooded during a storm. Apex had a tech out within two hours who replaced the water inlet valve with a heavy-duty model. No problems since, even with Kissimmee's hard water. Professional and reasonably priced.

reviews.name: Lizbeth R.
reviews.text: The gas range in our 1940s Winter Park home kept clicking endlessly. Technician found a spider nest in the igniter (only in Florida!) and installed a protective cover. Now it lights perfectly every time. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Our Bosch dishwasher stopped draining in our Lake Mary home. The tech cleared mineral buildup from the pump and installed a pre-filter for our hard water. Works better than new now - no more cloudy glasses!

reviews.name: Danielle W.
reviews.text: When our window AC died during July's heat wave, Apex came out same day. They replaced the capacitor and cleaned years of Orlando pollen from the coils. Cools our Thornton Park apartment better than it has in years.

reviews.name: Tyrone J.
reviews.text: After smelling something burning from our dryer in Baldwin Park, Apex found our vent completely clogged with sand and lint. Their thorough cleaning probably prevented a fire. Now we schedule annual maintenance with them.

serviceAreas.content: Apex Appliance Repair proudly serves the vibrant community of Kissimmee, FL, where many vacation rental properties require reliable appliance maintenance. Our team is well-versed in handling the wear and tear that comes with frequent use in rental homes, ensuring your appliances run smoothly for guests. With Kissimmee's hot and humid climate, refrigerators and air conditioning units often work overtime, making regular servicing essential to prevent breakdowns during peak seasons.
serviceAreas.localContext: Kissimmee is known for its vacation rental properties and proximity to major attractions like Walt Disney World.

serviceAreas.content: Winter Park's historic 1920s-40s Mediterranean Revival homes often feature vintage appliances that require specialized care. At Apex Appliance Repair, we understand the unique needs of these older properties and provide expert repairs to maintain their charm. The hot, humid summers in Winter Park can strain appliances, particularly refrigerators and dishwashers, making our prompt and reliable service a must for homeowners.
